final_sql:
WITH "seven_day_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM (
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210101
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210102
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210103
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210104
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210105
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210106
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210107
  ) AS "e",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
),
"two_day_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM (
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210106
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210107
  ) AS "e",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "s"."USER_PSEUDO_ID") AS "distinct_pseudo_users_in_7day_not_in_2day"
FROM "seven_day_users" AS "s"
LEFT JOIN "two_day_users" AS "t"
  ON "s"."USER_PSEUDO_ID" = "t"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
WHERE "t"."USER_PSEUDO_ID" IS NULL

WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    TO_DATE('20170430', 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "source",
    COALESCE("totals":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    TO_DATE('20170630', 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "source",
    COALESCE("totals":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170630
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    TO_DATE('20170331', 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "source",
    0 AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170331
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    TO_DATE('20170330', 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "source",
    0 AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170330
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    TO_DATE('20170228', 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "source",
    0 AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170228
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    TO_DATE('20170225', 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "source",
    0 AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170225
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    TO_DATE('20170325', 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "source",
    0 AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170325
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    TO_DATE('20170227', 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "source",
    0 AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170227
),
"source_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "source",
    SUM("transaction_revenue") AS "total_transaction_revenue"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  GROUP BY "source"
),
"top_source" AS (
  SELECT "source"
  FROM "source_totals"
  ORDER BY "total_transaction_revenue" DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
"monthly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', "session_date") AS "month",
    "source",
    SUM("transaction_revenue") AS "monthly_total_transaction_revenue"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE "source" = (SELECT "source" FROM "top_source")
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', "session_date"), "source"
)
SELECT
  "source",
  ROUND((MAX("monthly_total_transaction_revenue") - MIN("monthly_total_transaction_revenue")) / 1000000, 2) AS "difference_millions"
FROM "monthly_revenue"
GROUP BY "source"

WITH "session_hits" AS (
  SELECT
    "s"."trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("s"."visitStartTime")) AS "day",
    DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("s"."visitStartTime")) AS "week",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("s"."visitStartTime")) AS "month",
    "product"."VALUE":"productRevenue"::NUMBER AS "product_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170616 AS "s",
    LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "s"."hits") AS "hit",
    LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hit"."VALUE":"product") AS "product"
  WHERE "product"."VALUE":"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "s"."trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("s"."visitStartTime")) AS "day",
    DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("s"."visitStartTime")) AS "week",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("s"."visitStartTime")) AS "month",
    "product"."VALUE":"productRevenue"::NUMBER AS "product_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170620 AS "s",
    LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "s"."hits") AS "hit",
    LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hit"."VALUE":"product") AS "product"
  WHERE "product"."VALUE":"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "s"."trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("s"."visitStartTime")) AS "day",
    DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("s"."visitStartTime")) AS "week",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("s"."visitStartTime")) AS "month",
    "product"."VALUE":"productRevenue"::NUMBER AS "product_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170625 AS "s",
    LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "s"."hits") AS "hit",
    LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hit"."VALUE":"product") AS "product"
  WHERE "product"."VALUE":"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "s"."trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("s"."visitStartTime")) AS "day",
    DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("s"."visitStartTime")) AS "week",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("s"."visitStartTime")) AS "month",
    "product"."VALUE":"productRevenue"::NUMBER AS "product_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170626 AS "s",
    LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "s"."hits") AS "hit",
    LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hit"."VALUE":"product") AS "product"
  WHERE "product"."VALUE":"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL
),
"source_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    SUM("product_revenue") AS "total_product_revenue"
  FROM "session_hits"
  GROUP BY "traffic_source"
),
"top_source" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    "total_product_revenue"
  FROM "source_totals"
  ORDER BY "total_product_revenue" DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
"daily_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "sh"."day",
    SUM("sh"."product_revenue") / 1000000.0 AS "daily_product_revenue_millions"
  FROM "session_hits" AS "sh"
  INNER JOIN "top_source" AS "ts"
    ON "sh"."traffic_source" = "ts"."traffic_source"
  GROUP BY "sh"."day"
),
"weekly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "sh"."week",
    SUM("sh"."product_revenue") / 1000000.0 AS "weekly_product_revenue_millions"
  FROM "session_hits" AS "sh"
  INNER JOIN "top_source" AS "ts"
    ON "sh"."traffic_source" = "ts"."traffic_source"
  GROUP BY "sh"."week"
),
"monthly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "sh"."month",
    SUM("sh"."product_revenue") / 1000000.0 AS "monthly_product_revenue_millions"
  FROM "session_hits" AS "sh"
  INNER JOIN "top_source" AS "ts"
    ON "sh"."traffic_source" = "ts"."traffic_source"
  GROUP BY "sh"."month"
),
"daily_max" AS (
  SELECT
    MAX("daily_product_revenue_millions") AS "max_daily_product_revenue_millions"
  FROM "daily_revenue"
),
"weekly_max" AS (
  SELECT
    MAX("weekly_product_revenue_millions") AS "max_weekly_product_revenue_millions"
  FROM "weekly_revenue"
),
"monthly_max" AS (
  SELECT
    MAX("monthly_product_revenue_millions") AS "max_monthly_product_revenue_millions"
  FROM "monthly_revenue"
)
SELECT
  "ts"."traffic_source",
  "dm"."max_daily_product_revenue_millions",
  "wm"."max_weekly_product_revenue_millions",
  "mm"."max_monthly_product_revenue_millions"
FROM "top_source" AS "ts"
CROSS JOIN "daily_max" AS "dm"
CROSS JOIN "weekly_max" AS "wm"
CROSS JOIN "monthly_max" AS "mm";

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("totals":"pageviews"::STRING) AS "pageviews",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("totals":"transactions"::STRING) AS "transactions",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-04-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-07-31')

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("totals":"pageviews"::STRING) AS "pageviews",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("totals":"transactions"::STRING) AS "transactions",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170415
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-04-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-07-31')
),
"session_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "pageviews",
    "transactions",
    MAX(TRY_TO_NUMBER(p.value:"productRevenue"::STRING)) AS "productRevenue"
  FROM "sessions" AS s
  , LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => s."hits", OUTER => TRUE) AS h
  , LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => h.value:"product", OUTER => TRUE) AS p
  GROUP BY
    "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "pageviews",
    "transactions",
    "hits"
),
"classified_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "pageviews",
    CASE
      WHEN "transactions" >= 1 AND "productRevenue" IS NOT NULL THEN 'purchase'
      WHEN "transactions" IS NULL AND "productRevenue" IS NULL THEN 'non-purchase'
    END AS "purchase_group"
  FROM "session_revenue"
  WHERE
    ("transactions" >= 1 AND "productRevenue" IS NOT NULL)
    OR ("transactions" IS NULL AND "productRevenue" IS NULL)
),
"visitor_month_group" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "purchase_group",
    "fullVisitorId",
    SUM("pageviews") AS "visitor_pageviews"
  FROM "classified_sessions"
  GROUP BY
    "month",
    "purchase_group",
    "fullVisitorId"
)
SELECT
  "month",
  "purchase_group",
  AVG("visitor_pageviews") AS "avg_pageviews_per_visitor"
FROM "visitor_month_group"
GROUP BY
  "month",
  "purchase_group"
ORDER BY
  "month",
  "purchase_group"
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -45.0; best score among failed candidates

WITH "july_sessions" AS (
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "hits" FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170715
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "hits" FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170726
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "hits" FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170727
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "hits" FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170731
),
"purchased_products" AS (
  SELECT
    s."fullVisitorId",
    p.value:"v2ProductName"::TEXT AS "productName",
    COALESCE(p.value:"productQuantity"::NUMBER, 1) AS "productQuantity"
  FROM "july_sessions" AS s
  , LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => s."hits") AS h
  , LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => h.value:"product") AS p
  WHERE COALESCE(p.value:"productQuantity"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
),
"youtube_buyers" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "fullVisitorId"
  FROM "purchased_products"
  WHERE "productName" ILIKE '%YouTube%'
)
SELECT
  pp."productName"
FROM "purchased_products" AS pp
INNER JOIN "youtube_buyers" AS yb
  ON pp."fullVisitorId" = yb."fullVisitorId"
WHERE pp."productName" NOT ILIKE '%YouTube%'
GROUP BY pp."productName"
ORDER BY SUM(pp."productQuantity") DESC, pp."productName"
LIMIT 1

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitId",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170130
  WHERE "trafficSource":"campaign"::STRING ILIKE '%Data Share%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitId",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170131
  WHERE "trafficSource":"campaign"::STRING ILIKE '%Data Share%'
),
"hit_rows" AS (
  SELECT
    s."fullVisitorId",
    s."visitId",
    h.value:"hitNumber"::NUMBER AS "hitNumber",
    h.value:"page":"pagePath"::STRING AS "pagePath",
    h.value:"time"::NUMBER / 1000 AS "hitTimeSeconds"
  FROM "sessions" AS s,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => s."hits") AS h
  WHERE h.value:"page":"pagePath"::STRING IS NOT NULL
),
"sequenced_hits" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitId",
    "pagePath",
    "hitTimeSeconds",
    LEAD("pagePath") OVER (PARTITION BY "fullVisitorId", "visitId" ORDER BY "hitNumber") AS "next_page",
    LEAD("hitTimeSeconds") OVER (PARTITION BY "fullVisitorId", "visitId" ORDER BY "hitNumber") - "hitTimeSeconds" AS "time_on_home_seconds"
  FROM "hit_rows"
),
"home_transitions" AS (
  SELECT
    "next_page",
    "time_on_home_seconds"
  FROM "sequenced_hits"
  WHERE "pagePath" ILIKE '/home%'
    AND "next_page" IS NOT NULL
),
"most_common_next_page" AS (
  SELECT
    "next_page"
  FROM "home_transitions"
  GROUP BY "next_page"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, "next_page") = 1
)
SELECT
  m."next_page",
  MAX(h."time_on_home_seconds") AS "max_time_on_home_seconds"
FROM "most_common_next_page" AS m
JOIN "home_transitions" AS h
  ON m."next_page" = h."next_page"
GROUP BY m."next_page"

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "totals":"pageviews"::NUMBER AS "pageviews",
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) >= 1 THEN 'purchase'
      ELSE 'non_purchase'
    END AS "session_class"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170602
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-06-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-07-31')
    AND "totals":"pageviews" IS NOT NULL
),
"visitor_class_pageviews" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "session_class",
    SUM("pageviews") AS "visitor_total_pageviews"
  FROM "sessions"
  GROUP BY
    "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "session_class"
),
"monthly_avg" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "session_class",
    AVG("visitor_total_pageviews") AS "avg_pageviews_per_visitor"
  FROM "visitor_class_pageviews"
  GROUP BY
    "month",
    "session_class"
)
SELECT
  "month",
  MAX(CASE WHEN "session_class" = 'purchase' THEN "avg_pageviews_per_visitor" END) AS "purchase_avg_pageviews_per_visitor",
  MAX(CASE WHEN "session_class" = 'non_purchase' THEN "avg_pageviews_per_visitor" END) AS "non_purchase_avg_pageviews_per_visitor"
FROM "monthly_avg"
GROUP BY "month"
ORDER BY "month" ASC

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE('2017-01-01')
    AND TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') < TO_DATE('2017-04-01')
),
"hit_rows" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', "session_date") AS "month",
    "hit"."value":"eCommerceAction":"action_type"::STRING AS "action_type",
    "hit"."value":"page":"pagePath"::STRING AS "page_path",
    "hit"."value":"type"::STRING AS "hit_type"
  FROM "sessions",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hits") AS "hit"
),
"monthly_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    COUNT_IF("hit_type" = 'PAGE' AND "page_path" = '/productdetails') AS "product_detail_pageviews",
    COUNT_IF("action_type" = '3') AS "add_to_cart_events",
    COUNT_IF("action_type" = '6') AS "purchase_events"
  FROM "hit_rows"
  GROUP BY "month"
)
SELECT
  "month",
  ROUND(100.0 * "add_to_cart_events" / NULLIF("product_detail_pageviews", 0), 2) AS "add_to_cart_conversion_rate",
  ROUND(100.0 * "purchase_events" / NULLIF("product_detail_pageviews", 0), 2) AS "purchase_conversion_rate"
FROM "monthly_counts"
WHERE "product_detail_pageviews" > 0
ORDER BY "month" ASC

final_sql:
WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "visitorId",
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::TEXT AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160804
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    NULL AS "visitorId",
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    NULL AS "device_category",
    0 AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "visitorId",
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::TEXT AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "visitorId",
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::TEXT AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160819
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "visitorId",
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::TEXT AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160823
),
"first_visit" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    MIN("session_date") AS "first_visit_date"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"first_mobile_transaction" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    MIN("session_date") AS "first_mobile_transaction_date"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE "transactions" > 0
    AND "device_category" = 'mobile'
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"visitor_ids" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    MAX("visitorId") AS "visitorId"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
)
SELECT
  "v"."visitorId"
FROM "first_mobile_transaction" AS "fmt"
INNER JOIN "first_visit" AS "fv"
  ON "fmt"."fullVisitorId" = "fv"."fullVisitorId"
INNER JOIN "visitor_ids" AS "v"
  ON "fmt"."fullVisitorId" = "v"."fullVisitorId"
WHERE "fmt"."first_mobile_transaction_date" > "fv"."first_visit_date"
  AND "v"."visitorId" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY "v"."visitorId" ASC

final_sql:
WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("totals":"timeOnSite"::STRING) AS "time_on_site",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("totals":"transactions"::STRING) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("totals":"timeOnSite"::STRING) AS "time_on_site",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("totals":"transactions"::STRING) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("totals":"timeOnSite"::STRING) AS "time_on_site",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("totals":"transactions"::STRING) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160827
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("totals":"timeOnSite"::STRING) AS "time_on_site",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("totals":"transactions"::STRING) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160831
),
"new_users" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "session_date" AS "initial_visit_date",
    "time_on_site"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE "visitNumber" = 1
    AND "session_date" BETWEEN TO_DATE('2016-08-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-04-30')
    AND "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
),
"qualified_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    n."fullVisitorId"
  FROM "new_users" AS n
  JOIN "all_sessions" AS s
    ON n."fullVisitorId" = s."fullVisitorId"
   AND s."visitNumber" > 1
  WHERE n."time_on_site" > 300
    AND COALESCE(s."transactions", 0) > 0
)
SELECT
  100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT q."fullVisitorId") / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT n."fullVisitorId"), 0) AS "percentage_new_users"
FROM "new_users" AS n
LEFT JOIN "qualified_users" AS q
  ON n."fullVisitorId" = q."fullVisitorId";

final_sql:
WITH "base" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("publication_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') AS "publication_dt",
    ARRAY_SIZE("inventor") AS "inventor_count"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "country_code" = 'CA'
    AND "publication_date" >= 19600101
    AND "publication_date" < 20210101
    AND "inventor" IS NOT NULL
    AND ARRAY_SIZE("inventor") > 0
),
"grouped" AS (
  SELECT
    FLOOR((EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "publication_dt") - 1960) / 5) * 5 + 1960 AS "five_year_period_start",
    "publication_number",
    "inventor_count"
  FROM "base"
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "publication_dt") BETWEEN 1960 AND 2020
)
SELECT
  "five_year_period_start",
  AVG("inventor_count") AS "avg_inventors_per_patent",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS "total_patent_publications"
FROM "grouped"
GROUP BY "five_year_period_start"
ORDER BY "five_year_period_start" ASC

final_sql:
WITH "a61_applications" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "p"."application_number",
    "p"."filing_date",
    "p"."assignee_harmonized":"name"::TEXT AS "assignee_name"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS "p"
  WHERE "p"."application_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND "p"."filing_date" IS NOT NULL
    AND "p"."assignee_harmonized":"name" IS NOT NULL
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.CPC_DEFINITION AS "c"
      WHERE "c"."symbol" LIKE 'A61%'
        AND (
          "p"."application_number" = "c"."applicationReferences":"applicationNumber"::TEXT
          OR "p"."application_number_formatted" = "c"."applicationReferences":"applicationNumberFormatted"::TEXT
        )
    )
),
"top_assignee" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") AS "application_count"
  FROM "a61_applications"
  GROUP BY "assignee_name"
  ORDER BY "application_count" DESC, "assignee_name"
  LIMIT 1
),
"assignee_year_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "a"."assignee_name",
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE("a"."filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "filing_year",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "a"."application_number") AS "application_count"
  FROM "a61_applications" AS "a"
  INNER JOIN "top_assignee" AS "t"
    ON "a"."assignee_name" = "t"."assignee_name"
  GROUP BY
    "a"."assignee_name",
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE("a"."filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD'))
)
SELECT
  "assignee_name",
  "filing_year",
  "application_count"
FROM "assignee_year_counts"
ORDER BY "application_count" DESC, "filing_year" DESC
LIMIT 1
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -40.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "class_publications" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    p."application_number",
    p."country_code",
    p."assignee_harmonized"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p
  WHERE p."application_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND p."application_kind" = 'A01B3'
),
"assignees" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    cp."application_number",
    cp."country_code",
    COALESCE(f.value:"name"::TEXT, f.value::TEXT) AS "assignee_name"
  FROM "class_publications" AS cp,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => cp."assignee_harmonized") AS f
  WHERE COALESCE(f.value:"name"::TEXT, f.value::TEXT) IS NOT NULL
),
"assignee_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    a."assignee_name",
    COUNT(DISTINCT a."application_number") AS "total_applications"
  FROM "assignees" AS a
  GROUP BY a."assignee_name"
),
"top_3_assignees" AS (
  SELECT
    at."assignee_name",
    at."total_applications"
  FROM "assignee_totals" AS at
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    ORDER BY at."total_applications" DESC, at."assignee_name"
  ) <= 3
),
"application_years" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    a."assignee_name",
    a."application_number",
    a."country_code",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(a."application_number", 1, 4)) AS "application_year"
  FROM "assignees" AS a
  INNER JOIN "top_3_assignees" AS t
    ON a."assignee_name" = t."assignee_name"
  WHERE TRY_TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(a."application_number", 1, 4)) IS NOT NULL
),
"yearly_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    ay."assignee_name",
    ay."application_year",
    COUNT(DISTINCT ay."application_number") AS "applications_in_year"
  FROM "application_years" AS ay
  GROUP BY
    ay."assignee_name",
    ay."application_year"
),
"top_year_per_assignee" AS (
  SELECT
    yc."assignee_name",
    yc."application_year",
    yc."applications_in_year"
  FROM "yearly_counts" AS yc
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY yc."assignee_name"
    ORDER BY yc."applications_in_year" DESC, yc."application_year"
  ) = 1
),
"country_counts_in_top_year" AS (
  SELECT
    ay."assignee_name",
    ty."application_year",
    ay."country_code",
    COUNT(DISTINCT ay."application_number") AS "country_applications"
  FROM "application_years" AS ay
  INNER JOIN "top_year_per_assignee" AS ty
    ON ay."assignee_name" = ty."assignee_name"
   AND ay."application_year" = ty."application_year"
  GROUP BY
    ay."assignee_name",
    ty."application_year",
    ay."country_code"
),
"top_country_per_assignee" AS (
  SELECT
    c."assignee_name",
    c."application_year",
    c."country_code"
  FROM "country_counts_in_top_year" AS c
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY c."assignee_name", c."application_year"
    ORDER BY c."country_applications" DESC, c."country_code"
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
  t."assignee_name",
  t."total_applications",
  y."application_year" AS "year_with_most_applications",
  y."applications_in_year" AS "applications_in_that_year",
  c."country_code" AS "top_country_code_in_that_year"
FROM "top_3_assignees" AS t
INNER JOIN "top_year_per_assignee" AS y
  ON t."assignee_name" = y."assignee_name"
INNER JOIN "top_country_per_assignee" AS c
  ON y."assignee_name" = c."assignee_name"
 AND y."application_year" = c."application_year"
ORDER BY t."total_applications" DESC, t."assignee_name";
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=join_first) scored -40.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

WITH "months" AS (
  SELECT
    DATEADD(MONTH, SEQ4(), DATE_FROM_PARTS(2008, 1, 1)) AS "month_start"
  FROM TABLE(GENERATOR(ROWCOUNT => 180))
),
"iot_publications" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(
      'MONTH',
      TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("p"."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')
    ) AS "month_start",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "p"."publication_number") AS "publication_count"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS "p",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "p"."abstract_localized") AS "a"
  WHERE "p"."publication_number" ILIKE 'US%'
    AND TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("p"."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') >= DATE_FROM_PARTS(2008, 1, 1)
    AND TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("p"."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') < DATE_FROM_PARTS(2023, 1, 1)
    AND "a".VALUE:"text"::STRING ILIKE '%internet of things%'
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  "m"."month_start",
  COALESCE("i"."publication_count", 0) AS "publication_count"
FROM "months" AS "m"
LEFT JOIN "iot_publications" AS "i"
  ON "m"."month_start" = "i"."month_start"
ORDER BY "m"."month_start" ASC

WITH "granted_2010_utility" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "publication_number",
    "application_number",
    TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') AS "filing_dt"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "grant_date" BETWEEN 20100101 AND 20101231
    AND LOWER("application_kind") = 'utility'
    AND "filing_date" IS NOT NULL
    AND "publication_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND "application_number" IS NOT NULL
),
"forward_citations" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    cited.value:"publication_number"::TEXT AS "cited_publication_number",
    p."application_number" AS "citing_application_number",
    TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') AS "citing_filing_dt"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => p."citation") AS cited
  WHERE cited.value:"publication_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND p."application_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND p."filing_date" IS NOT NULL
),
"citation_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    g."publication_number",
    g."application_number",
    COUNT(DISTINCT f."citing_application_number") AS "forward_citation_count"
  FROM "granted_2010_utility" AS g
  LEFT JOIN "forward_citations" AS f
    ON f."cited_publication_number" = g."publication_number"
   AND f."citing_filing_dt" >= g."filing_dt"
   AND f."citing_filing_dt" <= DATEADD(YEAR, 10, g."filing_dt")
   AND f."citing_application_number" <> g."application_number"
  GROUP BY g."publication_number", g."application_number"
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS "utility_patents_with_exactly_one_forward_citation"
FROM "citation_counts"
WHERE "forward_citation_count" = 1;

WITH "granted_patents" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "citation"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "grant_date" BETWEEN 20100101 AND 20181231
),
"sea_citation_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    gp."publication_number",
    COUNT(*) AS "backward_citation_count_sea"
  FROM "granted_patents" AS gp
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => gp."citation") AS f ON TRUE
  WHERE f.value:"category"::TEXT = 'SEA'
  GROUP BY gp."publication_number"
)
SELECT
  gp."publication_number",
  COALESCE(scc."backward_citation_count_sea", 0) AS "backward_citation_count_sea"
FROM "granted_patents" AS gp
LEFT JOIN "sea_citation_counts" AS scc
  ON gp."publication_number" = scc."publication_number"
ORDER BY gp."publication_number" ASC
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -50.0; best score among failed candidates

WITH "pubs" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR("publication_number", 3, 4)) AS "pub_year",
    "claims_localized",
    "claims_localized_html"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "publication_number" LIKE 'US%B2'
),
"claims_texts" AS (
  SELECT
    "p"."publication_number",
    "p"."pub_year",
    COALESCE("f".value:"text"::STRING, "f".value::STRING) AS "claims_text"
  FROM "pubs" AS "p",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "p"."claims_localized") AS "f"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "p"."publication_number",
    "p"."pub_year",
    COALESCE("f".value:"text"::STRING, "f".value::STRING) AS "claims_text"
  FROM "pubs" AS "p",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "p"."claims_localized_html") AS "f"
),
"patents_without_claim_word" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number"
  FROM "claims_texts"
  WHERE "pub_year" BETWEEN 2008 AND 2018
    AND "claims_text" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "publication_number"
  HAVING COUNT_IF("claims_text" ILIKE '%claim%') = 0
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "patent_count"
FROM "patents_without_claim_word";

WITH "cn_granted_patents" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "p"."family_id",
    "p"."application_number"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS "p"
  WHERE "p"."family_id" IS NOT NULL
    AND "p"."application_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND "p"."application_kind" = 'A'
    AND "p"."application_number_formatted" LIKE 'CN%'
    AND TRY_TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR("p"."application_number_formatted", 3, 4)) BETWEEN 2010 AND 2023
),
"family_application_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "p"."family_id",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "p"."application_number") AS "distinct_applications_per_family"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS "p"
  WHERE "p"."family_id" IS NOT NULL
    AND "p"."application_number" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "p"."family_id"
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT "p"."application_number") > 1
)
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT "g"."application_number") AS "patent_count"
FROM "cn_granted_patents" AS "g"
INNER JOIN "family_application_counts" AS "f"
  ON "g"."family_id" = "f"."family_id";

WITH "us_b2_publications" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "country_code" = 'US'
    AND "kind_code" = 'B2'
    AND TRY_TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR("publication_number", 3, 8)) BETWEEN 20220601 AND 20220831
),
"ipc_codes" AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTR(TRIM(f.value::STRING), 1, 4) AS "ipc_4",
    p."publication_number"
  FROM "us_b2_publications" AS p,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => p."ipc") AS f
  WHERE f.value IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  "ipc_4",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS "patent_count"
FROM "ipc_codes"
WHERE "ipc_4" IS NOT NULL
  AND LENGTH("ipc_4") = 4
GROUP BY "ipc_4"
ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "ipc_4"
LIMIT 1

final_sql:
WITH "filtered_publications" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "country_code" = 'US'
    AND "kind_code" = 'B2'
    AND "publication_date" BETWEEN 20220601 AND 20220930
),
"ipc_codes" AS (
  SELECT
    fp."publication_number",
    SUBSTR(REPLACE(f.value:"code"::TEXT, ' ', ''), 1, 4) AS "ipc4"
  FROM "filtered_publications" AS fp,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => fp."ipc") AS f
  WHERE f.value:"code" IS NOT NULL
),
"ipc_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc4",
    COUNT(*) AS "ipc4_count"
  FROM "ipc_codes"
  WHERE "ipc4" IS NOT NULL
    AND LENGTH("ipc4") = 4
  GROUP BY "publication_number", "ipc4"
),
"ranked_ipc" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc4",
    "ipc4_count",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY "publication_number"
      ORDER BY "ipc4_count" DESC, "ipc4" ASC
    ) AS "rn"
  FROM "ipc_counts"
)
SELECT
  "publication_number",
  "ipc4"
FROM "ranked_ipc"
WHERE "rn" = 1
  AND "ipc4_count" >= 10
ORDER BY "publication_number" ASC, "ipc4" ASC;

final_sql:
WITH "us_b2_utility_patents" AS (
  SELECT
    p."publication_number",
    p."filing_date",
    TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') AS "filing_dt",
    YEAR(TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "filing_year",
    a."cited_by",
    a."similar"
  FROM PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS AS p
  INNER JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.ABS_AND_EMB AS a
    ON p."publication_number" = a."publication_number"
  WHERE p."publication_number" RLIKE '^US[0-9]+B2$'
    AND p."publication_number" NOT RLIKE '^USD'
    AND p."publication_number" NOT RLIKE '^USPP'
    AND p."publication_number" NOT RLIKE '^USRE'
    AND p."publication_number" NOT RLIKE '^USH'
    AND TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') >= DATE '2010-01-01'
    AND TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') < DATE '2015-01-01'
),
"forward_citation_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    u."publication_number",
    u."filing_date",
    u."filing_dt",
    u."filing_year",
    u."similar",
    COUNT(DISTINCT cb.value:"publication_number"::STRING) AS "forward_citations_within_1_month"
  FROM "us_b2_utility_patents" AS u,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => u."cited_by") AS cb
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(cb.value:"filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') >= u."filing_dt"
    AND TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(cb.value:"filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') < DATEADD(MONTH, 1, u."filing_dt")
  GROUP BY
    u."publication_number",
    u."filing_date",
    u."filing_dt",
    u."filing_year",
    u."similar"
),
"top_patent" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "filing_date",
    "filing_dt",
    "filing_year",
    "similar",
    "forward_citations_within_1_month"
  FROM "forward_citation_counts"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    ORDER BY "forward_citations_within_1_month" DESC, "publication_number"
  ) = 1
),
"similar_candidates" AS (
  SELECT
    t."publication_number" AS "target_publication_number",
    t."filing_year",
    s.value:"publication_number"::STRING AS "similar_publication_number",
    s.value:"score"::FLOAT AS "similar_score"
  FROM "top_patent" AS t,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => t."similar") AS s
  WHERE s.value:"publication_number" IS NOT NULL
),
"same_year_similar" AS (
  SELECT
    sc."target_publication_number",
    sc."similar_publication_number",
    sc."similar_score",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY sc."target_publication_number"
      ORDER BY sc."similar_score" DESC NULLS LAST, sc."similar_publication_number"
    ) AS "rn"
  FROM "similar_candidates" AS sc
  INNER JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS AS p2
    ON sc."similar_publication_number" = p2."publication_number"
  WHERE YEAR(TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p2."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) = sc."filing_year"
)
SELECT
  t."publication_number",
  t."filing_date",
  t."forward_citations_within_1_month",
  s."similar_publication_number" AS "most_similar_patent_same_filing_year"
FROM "top_patent" AS t
LEFT JOIN "same_year_similar" AS s
  ON t."publication_number" = s."target_publication_number"
 AND s."rn" = 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 3 (strategy=metric_first) scored -40.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed
